chunks.page_summary: This page details the compatibility of Rheonics SRV in-line viscometers and SRD in-line density meters with various PROFINET-compatible PLCs and engineering tools, specifically highlighting integration with Siemens TIA Portal and Wago Codesys.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Which PLCs are compatible with PROFINET?

Modified on: Tue, 1 Aug, 2023 at 11:24 PM

PROFINET protocol is widely used in industrial automation systems, and it offers a high-speed data transfer capability, real-time performance, and flexible networking capabilities. PROFINET supports a number of automation applications because of its compatibility with a wide range of controllers and engineering tools. SRV in-line viscometer and SRD in-line density meter from Rheonics with PROFINET protocol enabled are also compatible with controllers and engineering tools for their configuration.

PROFINET-compatible controllers and engineering tools are available from Siemens, Schneider Electric, Phoenix Contact, Turck, Wago, B&R Automation, Beckhoff Automation, and many others. It means users can choose the brand that best suits their needs regarding performance, features, and budget when selecting the right automation devices for their applications. Some of the most common brands that provide engineering tools that are PROFINET compatible to be used to monitor or control SRV in-line viscometer and SRD in-line density meter from Rheonics are the following:

1. Siemens

Siemens provides a range of engineering tools for PROFINET, including the TIA Portal, an integrated engineering framework that supports a variety of PLCs, HMIs, and other automation devices. Integration with TIA Portal: https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000292767 PROFINET integration of Rheonics devices using TIA portal. (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000292767)

Figure 1. TIA Portal software(Left) and PLC programmer(S7-1500) [1]

2. Wago

Wago provides engineering tools for their PFC200 and 750-8212 PLCs, which are PLCs fully compatible with the PROFINET protocol. Integration with Codesys: https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297648) (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000409807 PROFINET integration of Rheonics devices using Codesys. (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297648)
key_facts: The PROFINET protocol is widely adopted in industrial automation, offering high-speed data transfer, real-time performance, and flexible networking capabilities.
Rheonics SRV in-line viscometers and SRD in-line density meters, when PROFINET protocol enabled, are compatible with various controllers and engineering tools for configuration.
PROFINET-compatible controllers and engineering tools are available from multiple brands including Siemens, Schneider Electric, Phoenix Contact, Turck, Wago, B&R Automation, and Beckhoff Automation.
Siemens provides engineering tools for PROFINET, such as the TIA Portal, an integrated framework that supports PLCs, HMIs, and other automation devices.
Wago offers engineering tools for their PFC200 and 750-8212 PLCs, which are fully compatible with the PROFINET protocol, facilitating integration of Rheonics devices using Codesys.
diagram_labels: Figure 1. TIA Portal software(Left) and PLC programmer(S7-1500) [1]

chunks.page_summary: This page illustrates a Wago PFC200 PROFINET-compatible PLC and details the integration of Rheonics sensors with Beckhoff PROFINET controllers, specifically the CX8093, using TwinCAT 3 as the engineering tool.
chunks.extracted_text:
Figure 2. PROFINET compatible PLC PFC200 Wago[2]

3. Beckhoff Automation

Beckhoff Automation provides a range of PROFINET-compatible controllers, including their CX series like the CX8093 (control system with PROFINET RT device interface). The engineering tool is TwinCAT 3 and it is specially designed to set the operation with Rheonics Sensor.
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297916
PROFINET integration of Rheonics devices using TwinCAT (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297916)
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297916
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297916
https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000297916
key_facts: The Wago PFC200 is identified as a PROFINET-compatible PLC.
Beckhoff Automation provides various PROFINET-compatible controllers, including their CX series.
The Beckhoff CX8093 is a control system featuring a PROFINET RT device interface.
TwinCAT 3 is the engineering tool utilized with Beckhoff controllers.
TwinCAT 3 is specifically designed for configuring and operating Rheonics Sensors.
Rheonics offers support and solutions for PROFINET integration of its devices using TwinCAT.
